StockOrder.title: StockOrder
StockOrder.description: Represents a user-created stock order containing multiple items for a specific site, before or after submission.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockOrder entity.

customerName.description: The name of the customer or person placing the stock order.

orderDate.description: The date and time when the stock order was placed.

site.description: The designated site or location for which the stock order is being placed.

status.description: The current workflow status of the stock order (e.g., 'Draft', 'Submitted', 'Archived'). 'Submitted' indicates a corresponding OrderTask has been created.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the stock order record was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the stock order record was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single item and its quantity within a specific stock order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

stockOrderId.description: Reference to the StockOrder this item belongs to. (Relationship: StockOrder 1:N OrderItem)

itemName.description: The name or description of the item being ordered.

quantity.description: The numerical quantity of the item being ordered. Typically a positive integer.

OrderTask.title: OrderTask
OrderTask.description: Represents a task generated upon submission of a stock order, faulty equipment report, or incomplete task report.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderTask entity.

stockOrderId.description: Reference to the associated report (StockOrder, FaultyEquipment, or IncompleteTask).

title.description: A concise title for the processing task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current workflow status of the task (e.g., 'Pending Review', 'Completed').

assignedToUserId.description: Optional reference to the user assigned to complete this task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was initially created.

completedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was marked as completed.

FaultyEquipmentReport.title: FaultyEquipmentReport
FaultyEquipmentReport.description: A report submitted by a cleaner to request replacement of faulty equipment.

IncompleteTaskReport.title: IncompleteTaskReport
IncompleteTaskReport.description: A report explaining why a cleaning task could not be completed.

definition.description: Stores individual stock orders created by a user.
Stores faulty equipment reports submitted by cleaners.
Stores reports regarding incomplete cleaning tasks.
Unified tasks for reviewing orders and faulty equipment.
